message:
✨ Add navbar to enterprise layout + activate all 7 epics (#9760)

* ✨ Add top navbar to enterprise layout

Add the shared Navbar component to EnterpriseLayout so enterprise
dashboard routes have consistent top navigation including search,
user profile, theme toggle, AI missions button, and mobile menu.

Layout structure:
- Fixed Navbar at top (64px)
- Below: sidebar (left) + scrollable main content (right)
- Matches the main Layout positioning pattern

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Activate supply chain vertical + update portal stats

- Set supply-chain status to 'active' with score 68% (19/28 controls)
- Update portal summary: 7 of 7 verticals active, 179/220 controls passed
- All 7 enterprise compliance epics are now fully active

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
